mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in INDPRO signals that real activity and operating leverage are recovering; higher INDPRO momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days through upward earnings revisions.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value available for 2009-07-01 at 95.9709
failure_condition: Reject if triggered walk-forward tests show positive INDPRO 3-month momentum is followed by 20-day S&P 500 returns below the unconditional mean in more than 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises sharply from an already high level, household income risk and credit stress dominate policy support; a rising unemployment shock predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.3pp over 3 months and level is above 8.0%
failure_condition: Reject if observations meeting the UNRATE trigger produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or average returns are not below baseline at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: With FEDFUNDS pinned near zero and CPIAUCSL not accelerating, monetary accommodation lowers discount rates without an immediate inflation scare; this joint state predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is below 0.5% and CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation is below its prior 12-month average
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-rate and non-accelerating-CPI state has a 60-day mean forward return less than or equal to the unconditional mean over a 3-year rolling walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in RSAFS and HOUST signals broad private-demand repair across consumption and housing; when both improve, earnings expectations strengthen and S&P 500 returns are positive over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both rise over the latest 3-month window
failure_condition: Reject if the joint RSAFS-HOUST improvement state has 20-day forward returns below baseline in more than half of triggered cases after transaction-date alignment.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in HOUST from depressed levels leads construction activity, durable demand, and bank collateral quality; a large positive housing-starts impulse predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises > 10% over 3 months after being below its trailing 24-month average
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST rebound triggers are followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 45% of cases or by no positive mean excess return versus baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Improving PAYEMS momentum signals that firms are slowing layoffs or adding workers, lifting income expectations and reducing default risk; higher payroll momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if PAYEMS 3-month momentum has a 5-day forward Rank IC below 0.02 in every rolling 2-year window or its top-minus-bottom return spread is negative.

mechanism_narrative: If CPIAUCSL accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains near zero, real policy rates fall but inflation risk raises uncertainty about margins and future tightening; this combination predicts negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation crosses above its trailing 12-month average while FEDFUNDS is below 1.0%
regime_hint: inflation scare under constrained policy rates
failure_condition: Reject if this CPI acceleration and low-FEDFUNDS state is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 quarterly growth crosses from contraction to expansion, recession-risk premia compress and equity investors price a cyclical earnings rebound; this signal predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarterly growth crosses from negative to positive
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth-crossing signals do not produce higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-crossing periods in walk-forward tests at p < 0.10.
